title: The Three Families
tagline: Every word in the Quran belongs to one of three families. Learn to see them.
description: Before learning Arabic grammar, learn the map. Every single word in the Quran is one of three types — Ism, Fi'l, or Harf. Master the 3-letter root system and the detective mindset that unlocks everything else.

milestone.message: You now see what most people miss their entire lives. Every word has a family. Every word has a role.

lessons.title: Arabic Has Only Three Word Types
How to Read an Ayah Like a Detective
